timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp associated with the client request.

query.description: Optional query that the summary should be about

preferredSummaryLength.description: Optional length of summary output. If not given, defaults to 500 chars.

ugcType.description: The type of the user generated content (UGC datasource).

contentId.description: The numeric id for user generated content. Used for ANNOUNCEMENTS, ANSWERS, COLLECTIONS, SHORTCUTS.

docType.description: The specific type of the user generated content type.

ugcType.description: The type of the user generated content (UGC datasource).

ugcId.description: The string id for user generated content. Used for CHATS.

docType.description: The specific type of the user generated content type.

trackingToken.description: An opaque token that represents this particular result. To be used for /feedback reporting.

body.description: Includes request params such as the query and specs of the documents to summarize.
